notes: Constructs the pullback algebra hom [n]* : K(E) →ₐ[F] K(E) via division polynomial formulas (Φ_n/ΨSq_n, ω_n/ψ_n³) using AdjoinRoot.lift + IsLocalization.lift; key machinery is Jacobian smulEval at the generic point and an integral-closure transcendence argument for injectivity. Two dead-code private lemmas: jacobian_equation_smulEval (the proof of mulByInt_weierstrass duplicates the argument inline) and Φ_ff_transcendental (proved but never called). The set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false on mulByInt_x_transcendental has no justifying comment.
